item.title: Dead in the Yard
item.description: The first reveal says everything—this one had no business making it home. A restoration and diesel project with a clear before-and-after focus. What changed to get it back on the road?

media:content.media:title: Dead in the Yard
media:content.media:description: The first reveal says everything—this one had no business making it home. A restoration and diesel project with a clear before-and-after focus. What changed to get it back on the road?

item.title: 25 Years Dormant: The Kenworth Lives Again
item.description: A Kenworth truck that sat dormant for 25 years is brought back to life. The video follows the inspection, repairs, and first attempts to get the classic truck running again after decades of inactivity. Do you think it was worth restoring?

media:content.media:title: 25 Years Dormant: The Kenworth Lives Again
media:content.media:description: A Kenworth truck that sat dormant for 25 years is brought back to life. The video follows the inspection, repairs, and first attempts to get the classic truck running again after decades of inactivity. Do you think it was worth restoring?

item.title: This Flatbed Setup Was a Bad Idea
item.description: A small layout mistake turned into a lesson the hard way. A practical reminder that garage setups and layout choices can affect the work. What would you change first?

media:content.media:title: This Flatbed Setup Was a Bad Idea
media:content.media:description: A small layout mistake turned into a lesson the hard way. A practical reminder that garage setups and layout choices can affect the work. What would you change first?

item.title: One Turn From Waking the K100
item.description: A stubborn cabover and a dead 3406b make a pretty good argument for one more try. Can the K100 come back to life?

media:content.media:title: One Turn From Waking the K100
media:content.media:description: A stubborn cabover and a dead 3406b make a pretty good argument for one more try. Can the K100 come back to life?

item.title: What Actually Fails in a Coyote 5.0
item.description: It’s the kind of weakness that changes how you look at the whole engine. A close look at what fails in a Coyote 5.0 and what that means for the rest of the build. What do you think is the weak point?

media:content.media:title: What Actually Fails in a Coyote 5.0
media:content.media:description: It’s the kind of weakness that changes how you look at the whole engine. A close look at what fails in a Coyote 5.0 and what that means for the rest of the build. What do you think is the weak point?

item.title: Mustang Combo Build
item.description: We had to try this Mustang combo to see if the idea paid off. A hands-on look at the build, restoration work, and project car decisions in the garage. Did the setup come together as planned?

media:content.media:title: Mustang Combo Build
media:content.media:description: We had to try this Mustang combo to see if the idea paid off. A hands-on look at the build, restoration work, and project car decisions in the garage. Did the setup come together as planned?

item.title: #diesel #swap #restoration CAT 3126 in F-350
item.description: A CAT 3126 is running in an F-350 after a diesel swap and restoration work. The result is more unusual than expected. What do you think of the setup?

media:content.media:title: #diesel #swap #restoration CAT 3126 in F-350
media:content.media:description: A CAT 3126 is running in an F-350 after a diesel swap and restoration work. The result is more unusual than expected. What do you think of the setup?
